CustomField.description: The date the program received a copy of the inspection report. Tip: Define which inspection report this refers to (home, pest) and add additional fields if necessary to track other reports.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The date the program received a copy of the inspection report.
Tip: Define which inspection report this refers to (home, pest) and add additional fields if necessary to track other reports.
CustomField.label: Inspection Report Received
